chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1857 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7005/24 3.For hearing of main case 20-03-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** Abdul Samad Dahar, AXEN Irrigation Department Barrage Division, Sukkur is present and submits that petitioner No.1 has been retired; however petitioner No.2 was re-posted on the same post, for which this petition was maintained. After such statement, counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
